gaps_identified.title: Local Media Processing Command Utility
gaps_identified.description: Develop a custom skill or script to handle resizing, transparency, and media metadata locally.

gaps_identified.title: Chrome Remote Debugging Assist
gaps_identified.description: Integrate a detailed diagnostic check and troubleshooting guide within the system's runtime.

raw_data.content: Most AI agents use cloud services to resize images. I want local resizing for privacy and speed.
Setting up Chrome for remote debugging in Antigravity needs to be smoother. Give us a check script.
